ops.text: E2 FINAL VERDICT (2026-07-10, v2 valid run; verdict.md in lab results/E2): two_stage WINS. Fire/abstain solved — sentinel-prob AUC 0.853 (best=final iter 1520), threshold-sweepable (F1-point 0.823: P .776/R .877; budget point P .976/R .360 @1.2% false-fire), standalone abstain F1 0.773, two_stage F1 .619 vs gate-only .608 with fire@no-steer halved (.136 vs .192). Draft content weak AND mis-measured: 0W/0T/142L, but 66/100 judged rows are direction/Q&A whose reference is an option label — structurally unwinnable under the pairwise judge; genuine defect underneath = attractor collapse (53/97 fired rows share one generic draft; 0/97 verbatim train memorization). Stage 3 = near-total veto both runs, all configs (fires 0-2/100; frontier-alone R .07) — role must change to rewrite-only before it can earn cost. NEXT: source-split quality eval (Q&A → option-resolution accuracy; prose → win-or-tie), multi-epoch/dedup SFT for generation, stage-3 rewrite-only experiment.
